tool.name: WGCNA: Full Pipeline
tool.description: Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis — module detection, trait association, hub genes

configfiles.configfile: counts_file = $counts_file metadata_file = $metadata_file soft_power = $soft_power network_type = $network_type tom_type = $tom_type min_module_size = $min_module_size merge_cut_height = $merge_cut_height log_transform = $log_transform filter_by_variance = $filter_by_variance variance_quantile = $variance_quantile run_sample_gene_qc = $run_sample_gene_qc trait_columns = $trait_columns

## wgcna_script.R -- embedded via <configfile> library(WGCNA) library(igraph)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE) allowWGCNAThreads()
## ── Read config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── cfg <- read.delim("config.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "=", strip.white = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) cfg_list <- setNames(trimws(cfg[, 2]), trimws(cfg[, 1]))
counts_file <- cfg_list[["counts_file"]] metadata_file <- cfg_list[["metadata_file"]] soft_power <- as.integer(cfg_list[["soft_power"]]) network_type <- cfg_list[["network_type"]] tom_type <- cfg_list[["tom_type"]] min_module_size <- as.integer(cfg_list[["min_module_size"]]) merge_cut_height <- as.numeric(cfg_list[["merge_cut_height"]]) log_transform <- cfg_list[["log_transform"]] == "true" filter_by_variance <- cfg_list[["filter_by_variance"]] == "true" variance_quantile <- as.numeric(cfg_list[["variance_quantile"]]) run_sample_gene_qc <- cfg_list[["run_sample_gene_qc"]] == "true" trait_columns <- trimws(strsplit(cfg_list[["trait_columns"]], ",")[[1]]) trait_columns <- trait_columns[nzchar(trait_columns)]
if (length(trait_columns) == 0) { stop("At least one numeric trait column must be provided.") }
dir.create("plots", showWarnings = FALSE) dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE)
cat("Config loaded. Starting WGCNA analysis...\n")
## ── STEP 1: Load data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── counts <- read.delim(counts_file, check.names = FALSE, row.names = 1) meta <- read.delim(metadata_file, check.names = FALSE) meta <- meta[, colnames(meta) != "", drop = FALSE]
cat("Data loaded:", nrow(counts), "genes x", ncol(counts), "samples\n")
## ── STEP 2: Prepare expression matrix ─────────────────────────────────────── expr_data <- as.matrix(counts) mode(expr_data) <- "numeric"
if (log_transform) { expr_data <- log2(expr_data + 1) }
missing_values <- sum(is.na(expr_data)) if (missing_values > 0) { expr_data <- expr_data[complete.cases(expr_data), ] cat("Removed rows with missing values. New dimensions:", dim(expr_data), "\n") }
gene_variances <- apply(expr_data, 1, var) filtered_expr_data <- expr_data
if (filter_by_variance) { variance_threshold <- quantile(gene_variances, variance_quantile, na.rm = TRUE) cat("Variance threshold (", variance_quantile * 100, "th percentile):", variance_threshold, "\n") filtered_expr_data <- expr_data[gene_variances > variance_threshold, ] } else { variance_threshold <- NA_real_ cat("Variance filtering disabled by user.\n") } cat("Genes after variance filtering:", nrow(filtered_expr_data), "\n")
png("plots/01_gene_variance_distribution.png", width = 800, height = 600, res = 100) hist(log10(gene_variances), breaks = 50, main = "Log10 Variance Distribution of Genes", xlab = "Log10(Variance)", col = "lightblue", border = "black") if (!is.na(variance_threshold)) { abline(v = log10(variance_threshold), col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2) } dev.off()
datExpr <- t(filtered_expr_data)
sampleTree <- hclust(dist(datExpr), method = "average") png("plots/02_sample_clustering.png", width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) par(mar = c(2, 5, 2, 2)) plot(sampleTree, main = "Sample Clustering to Detect Outliers", sub = "Height represents dissimilarity between samples", xlab = "", cex = 0.7) abline(h = 200, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2) dev.off()
png("plots/03_expression_data_distribution.png", width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) par(mfrow = c(1, 2)) hist(as.numeric(datExpr), breaks = 100, main = "Distribution of Expression Values", sub = ifelse(log_transform, "Log2-transformed counts", "Input counts"), xlab = "Expression Value", col = "lightblue", border = "white") set.seed(123) sel_genes <- sample(seq_len(ncol(datExpr)), min(20, ncol(datExpr))) boxplot(datExpr[, sel_genes, drop = FALSE], main = "Gene Expression Distributions\n(20 random genes)", xlab = "Genes", ylab = "Expression Value", las = 2, cex.axis = 0.7, col = "lightblue", border = "gray40") par(mfrow = c(1, 1)) dev.off()
## ── STEP 3: Prepare trait data ─────────────────────────────────────────────── if (ncol(meta) < 2) { stop("Trait data must include sample names in the first column and at least one trait column.") } sample_column <- colnames(meta)[1] if (anyDuplicated(meta[[sample_column]]) > 0) { stop("Duplicate sample names found in the first column of the trait data.") } rownames(meta) <- meta[[sample_column]]
sample_ids <- rownames(datExpr) missing_samples <- setdiff(sample_ids, rownames(meta)) if (length(missing_samples) > 0) { stop("Trait data is missing sample(s) from the count matrix: ", paste(missing_samples, collapse = ", ")) } meta <- meta[sample_ids, , drop = FALSE]
missing_traits <- setdiff(trait_columns, colnames(meta)) if (length(missing_traits) > 0) { stop("Trait column(s) not found in trait data: ", paste(missing_traits, collapse = ", ")) }
trait_data <- meta[, trait_columns, drop = FALSE] for (col in trait_columns) { original_values <- trait_data[[col]] numeric_values <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(original_values)) invalid_values <- is.na(numeric_values) & !is.na(original_values) & nzchar(trimws(as.character(original_values))) if (any(invalid_values)) { stop("Trait column '", col, "' contains non-numeric values. Provide cleaned numeric trait data.") } if (all(is.na(numeric_values))) { stop("Trait column '", col, "' contains no numeric values.") } trait_data[[col]] <- numeric_values }
rownames(trait_data) <- sample_ids
cat("Trait data prepared:", ncol(trait_data), "trait(s)\n") print(head(trait_data))
## ── STEP 4: Network construction ──────────────────────────────────────────── if (run_sample_gene_qc) { gsg <- goodSamplesGenes(datExpr, verbose = 3) if (!gsg[["allOK"]]) { datExpr <- datExpr[gsg[["goodSamples"]], gsg[["goodGenes"]]] trait_data <- trait_data[rownames(datExpr), , drop = FALSE] } } else { cat("WGCNA goodSamplesGenes filtering disabled by user.\n") }
cat("After goodSamplesGenes:", ncol(datExpr), "genes,", nrow(datExpr), "samples\n") if (ncol(datExpr) < min_module_size) { stop("Too few genes (", ncol(datExpr), ") remain after QC for min_module_size=", min_module_size) }
set.seed(12345) net <- blockwiseModules( datExpr, power = soft_power, networkType = network_type, TOMType = tom_type, minModuleSize = min_module_size, reassignThreshold = 0, mergeCutHeight = merge_cut_height, numericLabels = TRUE, pamRespectsDendro = FALSE, saveTOMs = TRUE, saveTOMFileBase = "WGCNA_TOM", verbose = 3 )
module_colors <- labels2colors(net[["colors"]]) module_gene_counts <- table(module_colors) cat("Modules identified (excluding grey):", sum(names(module_gene_counts) != "grey"), "\n") print(module_gene_counts)
png("plots/05_dendrogram_and_modules.png", width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) plotDendroAndColors( net[["dendrograms"]][[1]], module_colors[net[["blockGenes"]][[1]]], "Module Colors", dendroLabels = FALSE, hang = 0.03, addGuide = TRUE, guideHang = 0.05, main = "Gene Clustering Dendrogram and Module Colors" ) dev.off()
## ── STEP 5: Module eigengenes ──────────────────────────────────────────────── module_eigengenes <- orderMEs(net[["MEs"]]) ME_cor <- cor(module_eigengenes, use = "pairwise.complete.obs") ME_diss <- 1 - ME_cor ME_tree <- hclust(as.dist(ME_diss), method = "average")
png("plots/06_module_eigengene_dendrogram.png", width = 1000, height = 700, res = 120) plot(ME_tree, main = "Clustering of Module Eigengenes", xlab = "", sub = "", cex = 0.9) abline(h = 0.25, col = "red", lty = 2) dev.off()
## ── STEP 6: Module-trait associations ─────────────────────────────────────── trait_data_aligned <- trait_data[rownames(module_eigengenes), , drop = FALSE] module_trait_cor <- cor(module_eigengenes, trait_data_aligned, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
if (is.null(rownames(module_trait_cor))) { rownames(module_trait_cor) <- colnames(module_eigengenes) } if (is.null(colnames(module_trait_cor))) { colnames(module_trait_cor) <- colnames(trait_data_aligned) }
nSamples <- nrow(datExpr) module_trait_pval <- corPvalueStudent(module_trait_cor, nSamples)
text_matrix <- paste0(signif(module_trait_cor, 2), "\n(", signif(module_trait_pval, 1), ")") dim(text_matrix) <- dim(module_trait_cor)
png("plots/07_module_trait_heatmap.png", width = 1200, height = 800, res = 120) par(mar = c(8, 10, 3, 3)) labeledHeatmap( Matrix = module_trait_cor, xLabels = colnames(trait_data_aligned), yLabels = colnames(module_eigengenes), ySymbols = colnames(module_eigengenes), colorLabels = FALSE, colors = blueWhiteRed(50), textMatrix = text_matrix, setStdMargins = FALSE, cex.text = 0.6, zlim = c(-1, 1), main = "Module-Trait Relationships\n(correlation and p-value)" ) dev.off()
## ── STEP 7: Gene significance and module membership ────────────────────────── trait_of_interest <- colnames(trait_data_aligned)[1]
common_samples <- Reduce(intersect, list( rownames(datExpr), rownames(trait_data_aligned), rownames(module_eigengenes) )) datExpr <- datExpr[common_samples, , drop = FALSE] trait_data_aligned <- trait_data_aligned[common_samples, , drop = FALSE] module_eigengenes <- module_eigengenes[common_samples, , drop = FALSE] nSamples <- nrow(datExpr)
gene_significance <- cor(datExpr, trait_data_aligned[[trait_of_interest]], use = "pairwise.complete.obs") gene_significance_pval <- corPvalueStudent(as.numeric(gene_significance), nSamples) gene_significance <- as.numeric(gene_significance) names(gene_significance) <- colnames(datExpr) names(gene_significance_pval) <- colnames(datExpr)
trait_vec <- abs(module_trait_cor[, trait_of_interest, drop = TRUE]) best_idx <- which.max(trait_vec) most_relevant_module <- rownames(module_trait_cor)[best_idx] module_id_clean <- sub("^ME", "", most_relevant_module)
if (!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(module_id_clean)))) { module_name <- labels2colors(as.numeric(module_id_clean)) } else { module_name <- module_id_clean }
cat("Most relevant module:", most_relevant_module, "->", module_name, "\n")
names(module_colors) <- colnames(datExpr) module_genes <- names(module_colors)[module_colors == module_name] cat("Genes in module", module_name, ":", length(module_genes), "\n")
if (length(module_genes) == 0) { stop("No genes found in module ", module_name, ". Check if module_colors was created correctly.") }
## Module membership (MM) gene_module_membership <- cor( datExpr[, module_genes, drop = FALSE], module_eigengenes[, most_relevant_module, drop = TRUE], use = "pairwise.complete.obs" )
module_gene_info <- data.frame( Gene = module_genes, ModuleMembership = as.numeric(gene_module_membership), GeneSignificance = as.numeric(gene_significance[module_genes]), MM_pvalue = corPvalueStudent(as.numeric(gene_module_membership), nSamples), GS_pvalue = as.numeric(gene_significance_pval[module_genes]), stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) module_gene_info <- module_gene_info[order(-abs(module_gene_info[["ModuleMembership"]])), ]
png("plots/08_gene_significance_vs_module_membership.png", width = 1000, height = 700, res = 120) plot(abs(module_gene_info[["ModuleMembership"]]), abs(module_gene_info[["GeneSignificance"]]), xlab = paste("Module Membership in", module_name, "module"), ylab = paste("Gene Significance for", trait_of_interest), main = paste("MM vs GS in", module_name, "module"), pch = 20, col = module_name, cex = 1) abline(lm(abs(GeneSignificance) ~ abs(ModuleMembership), data = module_gene_info), col = "red", lwd = 2) dev.off()
write.table(module_gene_info, file = paste0("results/module_gene_info_", module_name, "_", trait_of_interest, ".tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
## ── STEP 8: Hub genes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── adjacency_matrix <- adjacency(datExpr[, module_genes, drop = FALSE], power = soft_power, type = network_type) connectivity <- colSums(adjacency_matrix) - 1
hub_info <- data.frame( Gene = module_genes, ModuleMembership = as.numeric(gene_module_membership), GeneSignificance = as.numeric(gene_significance[module_genes]), Connectivity = as.numeric(connectivity), stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) hub_info <- hub_info[order(-hub_info[["Connectivity"]]), ]
write.table(hub_info, file = paste0("results/hub_genes_", module_name, "_", trait_of_interest, ".tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
is_top10 <- hub_info[["Connectivity"]] > quantile(hub_info[["Connectivity"]], 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)
png(paste0("plots/09_hub_genes_", module_name, "_", trait_of_interest, ".png"), width = 800, height = 600, res = 120) plot(hub_info[["ModuleMembership"]], hub_info[["Connectivity"]], xlab = "Module Membership (MM)", ylab = "Connectivity (Intramodular)", main = paste("Hub Gene Identification in", module_name, "module"), pch = 20, col = ifelse(is_top10, "red", "black")) legend("topright", legend = c("Top 10% connected", "Other genes"), col = c("red", "black"), pch = 20, bty = "n") dev.off()
## ── STEP 9: Co-expression network visualization ────────────────────────────── gene_var <- apply(datExpr, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE) n_top <- min(1000, length(gene_var)) top_genes <- names(sort(gene_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n_top]
cat("Calculating TOM for top", n_top, "variable genes...\n")
adj_subset <- adjacency(datExpr[, top_genes, drop = FALSE], power = soft_power, type = network_type) tom_subset <- TOMsimilarity(adj_subset) colnames(tom_subset) <- top_genes rownames(tom_subset) <- top_genes
tom_thresh <- quantile(tom_subset[upper.tri(tom_subset)], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) adj_thresh <- tom_subset adj_thresh[adj_thresh < tom_thresh] <- 0 diag(adj_thresh) <- 0
network_graph <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(adj_thresh, mode = "undirected", weighted = TRUE, diag = FALSE) gene_color_map <- setNames(module_colors, colnames(datExpr)) node_colors <- gene_color_map[top_genes] node_colors[is.na(node_colors)] <- "grey" node_sizes <- log10(degree(network_graph) + 1) * 3 + 3
png("plots/14_coexpression_network.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 100) par(mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1)) set.seed(123) plot(network_graph, vertex.size = node_sizes, vertex.label = NA, vertex.color = node_colors, vertex.frame.color = NA, edge.width = 0.4, edge.color = "gray80", layout = layout_with_fr(network_graph), main = paste0("Co-expression Network\n(Top ", n_top, " Variable Genes, Top 5% Connections)")) unique_colors <- unique(node_colors[node_colors != "grey"]) if (length(unique_colors) <= 10) { legend("topright", legend = unique_colors, col = unique_colors, pch = 19, cex = 0.7, title = "Modules", bty = "n") } dev.off()
## ── STEP 10: Module eigengene network ──────────────────────────────────────── me_correlation <- cor(module_eigengenes, use = "pairwise.complete.obs") me_pvalue <- corPvalueStudent(me_correlation, nSamples)
cor_thresh <- 0.5 me_adj <- (abs(me_correlation) > cor_thresh) & (me_pvalue < 0.05) diag(me_adj) <- FALSE
n_edges <- sum(me_adj) / 2 cat("\nNumber of module pairs with |correlation| >", cor_thresh, "and p < 0.05:", n_edges, "\n")
if (n_edges == 0) { cat("\nNo edges at |r| > 0.5; trying |r| > 0.3...\n") cor_thresh <- 0.3 me_adj <- (abs(me_correlation) > cor_thresh) & (me_pvalue < 0.05) diag(me_adj) <- FALSE n_edges <- sum(me_adj) / 2 cat("Edges at |r| > 0.3:", n_edges, "\n") }
me_names <- colnames(module_eigengenes) module_ids_me <- sub("^ME", "", me_names) module_colors_me <- module_ids_me numeric_me <- suppressWarnings(!is.na(as.numeric(module_ids_me))) module_colors_me[numeric_me] <- labels2colors(as.numeric(module_ids_me[numeric_me])) names(module_colors_me) <- me_names
if (sum(me_adj) > 0) { me_network <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(me_adj, mode = "undirected", diag = FALSE) vertex_colors <- module_colors_me[vertex_attr(me_network, "name")] vertex_colors[is.na(vertex_colors)] <- "grey" vertex_attr(me_network, "color") <- vertex_colors module_sizes_table <- table(module_colors) module_sizes_net <- module_sizes_table[vertex_colors] module_sizes_net[is.na(module_sizes_net)] <- 10 node_sizes_me <- log10(as.numeric(module_sizes_net) + 1) * 10 + 10
png("plots/15_module_eigengene_network.png", width = 1000, height = 1000, res = 100) par(mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1)) set.seed(123) plot(me_network, vertex.size = node_sizes_me, vertex.label = vertex_colors, vertex.label.cex = 0.7, vertex.label.color = "black", vertex.color = module_colors_me, vertex.frame.color = "black", edge.width = 2.5, edge.color = "gray40", layout = layout_with_fr(me_network), main = paste0("Module Eigengene Network\n(|correlation| > ", cor_thresh, ", p < 0.05)")) dev.off() } else { cat("No significant module-module edges after thresholding.\n") }
me_cor_labeled <- me_correlation rownames(me_cor_labeled) <- module_colors_me colnames(me_cor_labeled) <- module_colors_me
png("plots/16_module_eigengene_correlation_heatmap.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 100) if (nrow(me_cor_labeled) > 1) { heatmap( me_cor_labeled, col = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(50), scale = "none", symm = TRUE, margins = c(8, 8), main = "Module Eigengene Correlation Heatmap" ) } else { par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2)) image( x = 1, y = 1, z = matrix(me_cor_labeled[1, 1], nrow = 1), col = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(50), zlim = c(-1, 1), axes = FALSE, main = "Module Eigengene Correlation Heatmap", xlab = "", ylab = "" ) axis(1, at = 1, labels = colnames(me_cor_labeled), las = 2) axis(2, at = 1, labels = rownames(me_cor_labeled), las = 2) } dev.off()
cat("\nWGCNA pipeline complete.\n") cat("Plots written to: plots/\n") cat("Results written to: results/\n")

param.name: counts_file
param.label: Counts matrix
param.help: Genes as rows, samples as columns. First column must be gene IDs.

param.name: metadata_file
param.label: Sample metadata
param.help: First column should be sample name. Additional selected trait columns must be cleaned numeric values.

param.name: soft_power
param.label: Soft-thresholding power
param.help: Use the value output by the 'WGCNA: Soft-Thresholding Power' tool.

param.name: min_module_size
param.label: Minimum number of genes required to form a module.

param.name: merge_cut_height
param.label: Module merge cut height
param.help: Modules with eigengene correlation above (1 - this value) will be merged.

param.name: filter_by_variance
param.label: Filter low-variance genes
param.help: Remove genes below the selected variance quantile before analysis.

param.name: variance_quantile
param.label: Variance filter quantile
param.help: Used only when low-variance gene filtering is enabled.

param.name: run_sample_gene_qc
param.label: Run WGCNA sample/gene QC filtering
param.help: Use goodSamplesGenes to remove samples or genes that fail WGCNA checks.

param.name: trait_columns
param.label: Metadata trait columns (comma-separated)
param.help: Numeric column names from the metadata file to use as traits for module-trait association.

data.name: plot_dendrogram
data.label: Plot: gene dendrogram and module colors

data.name: plot_mm_gs
data.label: Plot: module membership vs gene significance

tool.help:
**WGCNA Full Pipeline**
Runs the complete Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis (WGCNA) workflow:
1. **Data loading and QC** — optionally log2-transforms counts, filters low-variance genes, clusters samples. 2. **Network construction** — ``blockwiseModules`` builds the signed co-expression network. 3. **Module eigengenes** — computes and clusters module eigengenes. 4. **Module-trait association** — correlates eigengenes with user-provided numeric traits; produces a labeled heatmap. 5. **Gene significance and module membership** — ranks genes in the most trait-relevant module. 6. **Hub gene detection** — ranks genes by intramodular connectivity. 7. **Network visualizations** — co-expression network and module eigengene network plots.
**Tip:** Run **WGCNA: Soft-Thresholding Power** first and use its output power value here.
The sample metadata table must be cleaned before running this tool. The first column is treated as the sample name and must match the count matrix column names. Trait columns selected for association must be numeric.
